Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Consultant]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Consultants are a group that uses guerrilla tactics and hides to attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Consultants are capable of throwing blades to stop targets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Consultants are a group that can be hired.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Consultant's right hand is Calder's mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — A Consultant is expected to show Calder a secret entrance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Calder Marten drove Consultants away with the power of the Emperor's crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — The Consultant is a blond individual.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — Consultants are a group that Kerian belongs to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Consultants provide maintenance for equipment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — There are many different kinds of Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — A Consultant never misses her appointments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Consultants treat their temporary clients as if their word is Imperial law, but ultimately serve the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Consultants can be black-clad and fly across craters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Meia is undergoing Consultant training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Meia killed a Consultant by crushing its skull.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Consultant is a role or profession Shera aims to achieve.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Consultants serve the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — Consultants are often around the Emperor, either working for him or defending him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — Shera has a yellow-haired Consultant friend who defended her on Nakothi’s island.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan is a Consultant who previously attempted to sabotage the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — A Consultant called Shera.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Consultants follow orders from the Architects, clients, and the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Standard Consultant procedure is to group up and share information.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Consultants were prepared for war on the Gray Island.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — If the Consultants have taken over, they would not keep Meia alive if the Killer is their Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — The Consultant marches side-by-side with Estyr Six.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Consultant is a group consisting of the Gardeners and Shepherds orders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Consultants do not shout.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Consultants are individuals who guide others through the mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Consultants often work in teams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 17''' — Consultants are members of a Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Meia views her duty as a Consultant.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
